case_title: JOSEPH DICK VS. LA GALLERIA HOA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $125.00) SERVED SEP-02-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KATHLEEN TOLAND, DIRECTOR AT LARGE, BOARD OF DIRECTORS FILED BY DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH DICK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA, REPRESENTED BY KATHLEEN TOLAND, DIRECTOR AT LARGE, BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND MARIANA SALFITI, GENERAL MANGER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY DICK, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2019 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DICK, JOSEPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LA GALLERIA HOA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
